message.content:
@startuml
class TicTacToe {
  + turn : Turn
  + board : Board
  + players : Player[] [0..*]
  + TicTacToe()
  + Play()
}

class Board {
  - Color : char[,] [0..*] = {'x', 'o'}
  - tokens : char[,] [0..*]
  + Board()
  + IsTicTacToe() : bool
  - IsTicTacToe(token : char) : bool
  + IsComplete() : bool
  - IsTileEmpty(row : int, column: int) : bool
  - IsTileFull(row : int, column: int) : bool
  + ToString() : string
}

class Player {
  + color : char
  + Player(i: int)
  + Put(board : Board)
  + Move(board : Board)
  + Win()
}

class Turn {
  + value : int = 0
  + Turn()
  + Current() «Take»
  + Next() «NotTake»
  + Change()
}

class IO {
  + ReadString(title : string) : string
  + ReadInt(title : string) : int
  + Write(title : string)
  + WriteLn()
  + WriteError(format : string)
}

TicTacToe --> Board
TicTacToe --> Player
TicTacToe --> Turn
Board ..> IO
Player ..> IO

@enduml
